name: Ocho Old Fashioned
description: A rum-based twist on the classic Old Fashioned made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho, simple syrup, and Angostura bitters. A twist on an old favorite, this cocktail swaps whisky for BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho to bring a smooth Caribbean character to the classic.
recipe_steps: Pour all ingredients into a rocks glass.
Stir until well mixed and very cold.
Garnish with an orange peel twist.
searchable_text: Ocho Old Fashioned main rum BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum A rum-based twist on the classic Old Fashioned made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho, simple syrup, and Angostura bitters. A twist on an old favorite, this cocktail swaps whisky for BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho to bring a smooth Caribbean character to the classic. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum, 6.25 ml simple syrup, 2 dashes Angostura® bitters recipe steps Pour all ingredients into a rocks glass. Fill with ice. Stir until well mixed and very cold. Garnish with an orange peel twist.
